## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

A minimal code sample that reproduces the problem:

```php
// ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including any exception messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- SDK version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 -->
- PHP version: <!-- e.g. 8.2.10 -->
- Guzzle version: <!-- e.g. 7.8.1 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us diagnose the issue.
